280.chinese_text: 晚上好，你也来公园散步啊？我饭后出来走走，没想到碰到你了。#晚上好，是啊，我也来散步，太巧了，我们一起走呗。#好啊，太好了，一起走，聊聊天。#好嘞。
280.english_text: Good evening! You’re here for a walk in the park too? I came out after dinner, didn’t expect to run into you.#Good evening! Yeah, me too. What a coincidence, let’s walk together.#Sure, that’d be nice. Let’s chat while we walk.#Alright.

281.chinese_text: 你在看什么书？看起来很认真，给我看看呗。#一本小说，挺好看的，你要不要看？我看完借给你。#好啊好啊，太谢谢你了，我正愁没书看呢。#不客气，看完给你。
281.english_text: What book are you reading? You look so focused. Let me see.#A novel. It’s pretty good. Do you want to read it? I can lend it to you when I’m done.#Yes please! Thank you so much, I was just looking for something to read.#No problem, I’ll give it to you later.

282.chinese_text: 晚上的风有点凉，你怎么不穿外套？快穿上，别感冒了。#啊，忘了，出来太急了，没穿外套。#诺，给你我的外套，你先穿上，我不冷。#太谢谢你了，还是你对我好。
282.english_text: The evening wind is a bit cold. Why aren’t you wearing a coat? Put it on before you catch a cold.#Oh, I forgot. I left in a hurry and didn’t grab it.#Here, take my coat. I’m not cold.#Thank you so much, you’re always so good to me.

283.chinese_text: 你在便利店买什么？我要买瓶牛奶，顺便买些零食。#我也买些零食，晚上写作业的时候吃，我们一起买吧。#好啊，一起买，还能凑个伴。#好嘞。
283.english_text: What are you buying at the convenience store? I’m getting some milk and snacks.#I’m getting snacks too, for when I do homework tonight. Let’s go together.#Sure, it’s more fun with company.#Alright.

284.chinese_text: 晚上你会写作业到几点？我一般写到十点，写完就睡觉。#我也是，写完作业就睡觉，不熬夜，我们互相监督呗。#好啊，太好了，一起监督，不熬夜。#好嘞。
284.english_text: How late do you do homework at night? I usually finish at ten and go straight to bed.#Same here. No staying up late. Let’s hold each other accountable.#Great idea! Let’s make sure we don’t stay up late.#Okay.

285.chinese_text: 我家那边的路灯坏了，有点黑，我不敢一个人走，你陪我一段呗。#好啊，没问题，我陪你走到你家楼下，别害怕。#太谢谢你了，有你在我就放心了。#放心吧，有我呢。
285.english_text: The streetlights near my place are broken, it’s really dark. I’m scared to walk alone. Can you walk with me for a bit?#Sure, no problem. I’ll go all the way to your building. Don’t be afraid.#Thank you so much, I feel much safer with you.#Don’t worry, I’m here.

286.chinese_text: 你在听什么歌？声音很好听，给我分享一下呗。#一首轻音乐，写作业的时候听，很放松，我发链接给你。#太好了，谢谢你，我也想听听，放松一下。#不客气，马上发你。
286.english_text: What song are you listening to? It sounds nice. Share it with me.#Some soft music, it helps me relax while studying. I’ll send you the link.#Perfect, thank you! I want to listen and unwind too.#No problem, I’ll send it right now.

287.chinese_text: 晚上你会看电视吗？我写完作业会看一会儿，放松一下。#偶尔会看，不过不会看太久，怕耽误休息，我们一起看呗。#好啊，太好了，一起看更有意思。#好嘞。
287.english_text: Do you watch TV at night? I watch a little after homework to relax.#Occasionally, but not too long, I don’t want to lose sleep. We can watch together sometime.#Yes! That’d be way more fun.#Alright.

288.chinese_text: 你买的夜宵是什么？看起来好香，给我尝一口呗。#关东煮，晚上有点饿，吃点垫垫，给你尝一个，很好吃。#哇，真的好好吃，我也去买一份。#去吧去吧，就在楼下便利店。
288.english_text: What late-night snack did you get? It smells delicious. Let me try a bite.#Oden. I was hungry, so I got a little something. Here, taste one.#Wow, this is so good! I’m gonna go buy some too.#Go ahead, it’s at the convenience store downstairs.

289.chinese_text: 晚上的星星好亮，你看到了吗？真的太漂亮了。#看到了，今天天气很好，星星特别多，我们一起看看吧。#好啊，太好了，一起看星星，聊聊天。#好嘞。
289.english_text: The stars are so bright tonight! Did you see them? They’re gorgeous.#Yes, the weather’s perfect today, lots of stars. Let’s watch them together.#Great! Let’s stargaze and chat.#Alright.

290.chinese_text: 你在写作业吗？别太累了，休息一会儿，喝口水。#好啊，谢谢你，我正好有点累了，休息一会儿再写。#不客气，别太拼了，身体最重要。#知道啦，谢谢你。
290.english_text: Are you doing homework? Don’t push yourself too hard. Take a break and drink some water.#Okay, thanks. I was getting a bit tired anyway. I’ll rest a while then continue.#You’re welcome. Don’t overwork yourself, health comes first.#Got it, thank you.

291.chinese_text: 你家的狗狗好可爱，是柴犬吗？太萌了，让我摸摸呗。#对，是柴犬，很调皮，你摸摸吧，它不咬人。#太可爱了，好想养一只，太萌了。#哈哈哈，喜欢就常来摸。
291.english_text: Your dog is so cute! Is it a Shiba Inu? It’s adorable, can I pet it?#Yes, it’s a Shiba. He’s very naughty, but he doesn’t bite. Go ahead.#He’s so cute! I want one too.#Hahaha, come over anytime to pet him.

292.chinese_text: 我忘买笔记本了，你能陪我去楼下便利店买一下吗？我不敢一个人去。#好啊，没问题，我陪你去，正好我也想出去走走。#太谢谢你了，真是帮了我大忙。#小事一桩，走。
292.english_text: I forgot to buy a notebook. Can you come with me to the convenience store downstairs? I’m scared to go alone.#Sure, no problem. I’ll go with you, I feel like going out for a walk anyway.#Thank you so much, you really saved me.#It’s nothing. Let’s go.

293.chinese_text: 我还有一点作业没写完，有点难，你能帮我看看吗？#好啊，拿来我看看，我帮你讲解一下，很快就写完了。#太谢谢你了，有你在我就放心了。#放心吧，交给我。
293.english_text: I still have a little homework left, it’s kind of hard. Can you help me?#Sure, let me see. I’ll explain it to you, you’ll finish in no time.#Thank you so much, I feel so much better with you here.#Don’t worry, I’ve got this.

294.chinese_text: 晚上别玩太久手机，对眼睛不好，早点休息。#知道啦，你也是，别总熬夜复习，注意身体。#好的好的，我们一起早点休息，明天见。#明天见，晚安。
294.english_text: Don’t play on your phone too late at night, it’s bad for your eyes. Go to bed early.#Got it. You too, don’t stay up reviewing. Take care of yourself.#Okay, let’s both rest early. See you tomorrow.#See you tomorrow. Good night.

295.chinese_text: 你在煮什么？味道好香，是不是面条？#哈哈哈，被你发现了，我煮点面条，晚上有点饿，给你也煮一碗？#太好了，太谢谢你了，我也有点饿了。#好嘞，马上就好。
295.english_text: What are you cooking? It smells amazing. Is it noodles?#Hahaha, you guessed it. I’m making noodles, I’m hungry. Want a bowl?#Yes please! Thank you so much, I’m hungry too.#Alright, it’ll be ready soon.

296.chinese_text: 晚上的小区好安静，很适合休息，我们慢慢走，聊聊天。#好啊，我也喜欢这种安静的感觉，一起慢慢走，聊聊天。#太好了，我们聊聊今天在学校的事吧。#好嘞。
296.english_text: The neighborhood is so quiet at night, perfect for relaxing. Let’s walk slowly and chat.#Okay, I love this peaceful vibe. Let’s take our time and talk.#Great! Let’s talk about what happened at school today.#Alright.

297.chinese_text: 你借我的书，我看完了，太好看了，还给你，谢谢你推荐。#不客气，喜欢就好，我这里还有很多，下次再借你。#太好了，太谢谢你了，你真是我的宝藏朋友。#哈哈哈，彼此彼此。
297.english_text: I finished the book you lent me. It was amazing! Here you are. Thanks for recommending it.#You’re welcome. I’m glad you liked it. I have more, I can lend you some next time.#Awesome! Thank you so much, you’re the best friend ever.#Hahaha, right back at you.

298.chinese_text: 晚上你会复习今天的知识点吗？我打算复习一下，明天上课更容易听懂。#会的，我也打算复习，我们一起复习，互相提问呗。#好啊，太好了，一起复习，效率更高。#好嘞，开始吧。
298.english_text: Are you going to review today’s lessons tonight? I plan to, so it’s easier to follow in class tomorrow.#Yes, me too. Let’s review together and quiz each other.#Perfect! We’ll be way more efficient this way.#Alright, let’s start.

299.chinese_text: 晚安，早点休息，别熬夜，明天还要上学呢。#晚安，你也一样，早点休息，明天见，记得请我喝奶茶哦。#放心吧，肯定请你，晚安。#晚安。
299.english_text: Good night. Rest early, don’t stay up late. We have school tomorrow.#Good night, you too. Sleep early. See you tomorrow. And remember to buy me milk tea.#Don’t worry, I will. Good night.#Good night.

300.chinese_text: 早上好！今天你也搭乘早班电车来的吗？#嗯，是啊，刚好和你同一路线呢。#这样啊，下次要是碰到，我们可以一起走到学校。#好呀，那样也不会太无聊。
300.english_text: Morning! Did you also take the early train today?#Yeah, we’re on the same line.#I see. If we run into each other next time, we can walk to school together.#Sure, it won’t be so boring that way.

301.chinese_text: 抱歉，打扰一下，你知道三年二班的教室怎么走吗？我是转学生，有点迷路了。#哦，没问题，我正好也要去那边，我带你过去吧。#太感谢你了，麻烦你了。#不麻烦，顺路而已。
301.english_text: Excuse me, do you know how to get to Class 2, Grade 3? I’m a transfer student and I’m a bit lost.#Oh, no problem. I’m heading that way too, I’ll show you.#Thank you so much, sorry to trouble you.#It’s fine, we’re going the same way.

302.chinese_text: 你的制服领口歪了哦，可能是早上匆忙没整理好。#啊，真的吗？谢谢你提醒，我马上整理。#没事，很容易忽略的，整理好就很整齐啦。
302.english_text: Your uniform collar is a bit crooked. You probably rushed this morning and didn’t fix it.#Oh, really? Thanks for telling me, I’ll straighten it right away.#It’s easy to miss. Looks neat now.

303.chinese_text: 你手里拿的是社团的招募传单吗？看起来很有意思呢。#对哦，是吹奏部的，你要是感兴趣，放学后可以去活动室看看。#好呀，我正好想加入一个社团，谢谢你告诉我。
303.english_text: Is that a club recruitment flyer? It looks interesting.#Yeah, it’s for the wind band. If you’re interested, you can stop by the activity room after school.#Sure, I’ve been wanting to join a club. Thanks for letting me know.

304.chinese_text: 早会之前的自由时间，你一般都会做什么呀？#大多是看看漫画，或者整理一下课桌上的东西。#原来如此，我有时候会背背单词，偶尔也会看漫画。
304.english_text: What do you usually do during the free time before the morning assembly?#Mostly read manga or tidy up my desk.#I see. I sometimes memorize words, and occasionally read manga too.

305.chinese_text: 昨天的学园祭筹备会，你也参加了吧？我好像看到你了。#嗯，我负责帮忙布置场地，你也是来帮忙的吗？#不是哦，我是来看看进度，不过要是需要帮忙，我也可以搭把手。#那太感谢啦。
305.english_text: You were at the school festival preparation meeting yesterday, right? I think I saw you.#Yeah, I helped set up the venue. Were you there to help too?#No, I just came to check the progress, but I can lend a hand if you need.#That’d be a big help.

306.chinese_text: 你的便当盒看起来很精致呢，是家里人帮你准备的吗？#对呀，是妈妈早上做的，你也带了便当吗？#嗯，不过我的比较简单，不像你的看起来那么好吃。#下次可以让你妈妈试试这种做法哦。
306.english_text: Your bento box looks really nice. Did your family make it for you?#Yeah, my mom made it this morning. Did you bring a bento too?#Yeah, but mine’s pretty simple. Not as delicious-looking as yours.#I can tell your mom how to make it like this sometime.

307.chinese_text: 抱歉，我不小心撞到你了，没事吧？有没有伤到哪里？#没事没事，不碍事的，你也小心点，走廊人有点多。#好的，真的很抱歉。
307.english_text: Sorry, I bumped into you by accident. Are you okay? Did you get hurt?#It’s fine, really. Be careful though, the hallway is crowded.#Okay, I’m really sorry.

308.chinese_text: 你知道吗？今天的朝会，校长好像要宣布新的社团规定。#哦？是吗？我还不知道呢，谢谢你告诉我。#不客气，我也是昨天听学生会的人说的。
308.english_text: You know what? The principal is announcing new club rules at the morning assembly today.#Oh, really? I had no idea. Thanks for telling me.#No problem. I heard it from the student council yesterday.

309.chinese_text: 你的发饰很可爱呢，是在车站前的饰品店买的吗？#对哦，就是那家新开的店，你也觉得好看吗？#嗯，特别好看，下次我也去看看。#好呀，那家店还有很多款式呢。
309.english_text: Your hair clip is so cute. Did you get it at the accessory shop in front of the station?#Yeah, the new one. Do you like it?#Yeah, it’s really nice. I’ll go check it out sometime.#Okay, they have lots of styles.

310.chinese_text: 早自习的自由朗读，你一般会读什么？#大多是轻小说，有时候也会读诗集。#哇，诗集吗？感觉很有格调呢，我也想试试。#可以呀，我有几本闲置的，下次带给你。
310.english_text: What do you usually read during free reading in morning self-study?#Mostly light novels, sometimes poetry.#Wow, poetry? That’s so classy. I want to try it too.#Sure, I have a few extra ones. I’ll bring them for you next time.

311.chinese_text: 今天的天气好像有点凉，你怎么没穿针织衫？#啊，我忘了放在包里了，还好不是特别冷。#我这里有备用的薄外套，你要是冷可以先穿上。#太谢谢你了，不用啦，我能坚持。
311.english_text: It’s a bit cold today. Why aren’t you wearing a cardigan?#Oh, I forgot to put it in my bag. Luckily it’s not too cold.#I have a spare thin coat if you want to borrow it.#Thanks, but I’ll be okay.

312.chinese_text: 你走路的时候慢一点，前面的台阶有点滑，昨天我差点摔倒。#好的，谢谢你提醒，你也小心点。#嗯，一起慢慢走就好。
312.english_text: Walk a bit slower. The steps ahead are slippery—I almost fell yesterday.#Okay, thanks for warning me. You be careful too.#Yeah, let’s just walk slowly together.

313.chinese_text: 你也是美术部的吗？我好像在美术室见过你。#对哦，我是美术部的，负责画宣传海报，你也是吗？#不是，我是路过的时候看到你画画，觉得画得很好看。#谢谢夸奖，你要是感兴趣，可以来美术室参观。
313.english_text: Are you in the art club too? I think I’ve seen you in the art room.#Yeah, I’m in the art club. I draw the posters. Are you in it too?#No, I saw you drawing when I passed by. Your work is really good.#Thanks. You can come visit the art room if you want.

314.chinese_text: 早会结束后，你要去小卖部买东西吗？我想去买瓶果汁。#好呀，我也想去买块面包，我们一起去吧。#太好了，这样就不用一个人去了。
314.english_text: After the assembly, are you going to the convenience store? I want to get some juice.#Sure, I’m gonna get a bread. Let’s go together.#Great, I won’t have to go alone.

315.chinese_text: 你的笔记本封面好特别，是动漫联名款吗？#对呀，是我很喜欢的动漫，你也看这部动漫吗？#嗯，我也很喜欢，没想到我们有一样的喜好。#哈哈，真的吗？太巧了。
315.english_text: Your notebook cover is so special. Is it an anime collaboration?#Yeah, it’s my favorite anime. Do you watch it too?#Yeah, I love it too. Didn’t know we had the same taste.#Haha, really? What a coincidence.

316.chinese_text: 抱歉，麻烦你帮我递一下那边的课本，我够不到。#好的，给你，下次可以把课本放在顺手的地方哦。#谢谢你，我知道啦，下次会注意的。
316.english_text: Sorry, could you pass me the textbook over there? I can’t reach it.#Sure, here you go. Maybe keep your textbooks within reach next time.#Thanks, I will.

317.chinese_text: 今天的早间广播，播放的歌曲很好听呢，你知道歌名吗？#知道哦，是最近很火的动漫主题曲，我把歌名发给你吧。#太感谢了，麻烦你了。#不麻烦，很简单的。
317.english_text: The song on the morning broadcast was really nice. Do you know the name?#Yeah, it’s the popular new anime theme song. I’ll send you the title.#Thank you so much.#No trouble at all.

318.chinese_text: 午休时间，你要去屋顶吃便当吗？那里人少，还能晒太阳。#好呀，听起来不错，我正愁食堂人太多呢。#那我们一起去吧，我知道屋顶有个很舒服的位置。
318.english_text: Lunch break! Wanna eat your bento on the rooftop? It’s quiet there and we can sunbathe.#Sure, sounds perfect. I was worrying about how crowded the cafeteria is.#Let’s go together. I know a really nice spot up there.

319.chinese_text: 你的便当里有玉子烧吗？看起来好好吃，我也好想吃。#有哦，我妈妈做了很多，分你一块吧。#太谢谢你了，麻烦你了，味道一定很好。#不客气，你尝尝看。
319.english_text: Do you have tamagoyaki in your bento? It looks so good, I want some too.#I do! My mom made a lot. Have a piece.#Thank you so much. It must taste delicious.#You’re welcome, go ahead and try.

320.chinese_text: 食堂今天的每日套餐是咖喱饭，你要去买吗？我正要去。#好呀，我也想吃咖喱饭，我们一起去吧，还能一起占个位置。#没问题，那我们赶紧去，不然要排队了。
320.english_text: Today’s cafeteria special is curry rice. Wanna go get some? I’m heading there now.#Yeah, I feel like curry too. Let’s go together and save seats.#Sure, let’s hurry so we don’t have to wait in line.

321.chinese_text: 午休的时候，你要不要一起去操场散散步？一直坐着有点闷。#好呀，我也想活动活动，顺便去看看社团的练习。#太好了，我们一起走，慢慢逛。
321.english_text: Wanna walk around the field during lunch break? I feel stuffy sitting still.#Sure, I need to stretch my legs too. We can check out club practice as well.#Great, let’s go and take it slow.

322.chinese_text: 我忘带纸巾了，你有多余的吗？借我一张，吃完便当要擦嘴。#有，给你一叠，不用急着还，下次记得带就好。#太感谢了，帮了我大忙。
322.english_text: I forgot my tissues. Do you have an extra? I need to wipe my mouth after eating.#Here you go, take a handful. No need to hurry returning them. Just remember next time.#Thanks a lot, you saved me.

323.chinese_text: 你吃完便当后，要去图书馆吗？我想去借本轻小说。#好呀，我也想去图书馆自习，我们一起去吧。#太好了，有个伴也不会太无聊。
323.english_text: After you finish your bento, are you going to the library? I want to borrow a light novel.#Yeah, I’m going there to study too. Let’s go together.#Nice, it won’t be boring with company.

324.chinese_text: 你的便当盒是保温的吗？这么久了还是热的。#对哦，是妈妈给我买的保温便当盒，很实用。#哇，真好，我也想换一个这样的，在哪里买的呀？#在车站前的杂货店，很便宜哦。
324.english_text: Is your bento box insulated? It’s still warm after so long.#Yeah, my mom bought me an insulated one. It’s really handy.#Wow, that’s nice. I want to get one too. Where did you buy it?#At the general store in front of the station. It wasn’t expensive.

325.chinese_text: 午休的时候，我们一起听音乐吧？我有一副备用耳机。#好呀，太谢谢你了，我正好也想听听音乐放松一下。#不客气，我们一起听，我给你分享几首好听的歌。
325.english_text: Let’s listen to music during lunch break, okay? I have an extra pair of earphones.#Sure, thank you so much. I was just wanting to relax to some music too.#No problem. We can listen together, I’ll share some good songs.

326.chinese_text: 食堂的味增汤有点咸，你觉得吗？#嗯，确实有点，我这里有矿泉水，你要是觉得咸可以喝一口。#太谢谢你了，正好我有点渴。
326.english_text: The miso soup in the cafeteria is a bit salty, don’t you think?#Yeah, it is. I have some water here, you can drink some if you want.#Thanks a lot, I’m actually a bit thirsty.

327.chinese_text: 你午休的时候，一般会睡午觉吗？我有时候会趴在桌子上睡一会儿。#会呀，睡一会儿下午上课才不会困，你要是想睡，我帮你看着老师。#太感谢了，麻烦你了。
327.english_text: Do you usually take a nap during lunch break? I sometimes sleep on my desk for a bit.#Yeah, I do. It keeps me awake in class. If you want to sleep, I’ll watch out for the teacher.#Thank you so much, I really appreciate it.

328.chinese_text: 我带了草莓大福，分你一个，是车站前甜品店买的，很好吃。#太谢谢你了，我正好想吃甜食，你也尝尝我的铜锣烧。#好呀，互相交换着吃，太幸福了。
328.english_text: I brought strawberry daifuku. Have one — it’s from the new dessert shop by the station.#Thanks! I was craving something sweet. You can try my dorayaki too.#Sure, swapping snacks is the best.#Hahaha, totally.

329.chinese_text: 午休结束后，社团有练习吗？我看到你们社团的人在操场集合了。#对哦，有练习，我马上就要过去，你要是感兴趣，可以来看看。#好呀，我下课了就去看。
329.english_text: Do you have club practice after lunch break? I saw your members gathering on the field.#Yeah, we do. I’m heading over soon. You can come watch if you want.#Okay, I’ll come after class.

330.chinese_text: 你不小心把便当洒了一点，我这里有湿巾，帮你擦一下吧。#啊，太谢谢你了，真是不好意思，麻烦你了。#没事，举手之劳，赶紧擦干净吧。
330.english_text: You spilled a little of your bento. I have wet wipes, let me help you clean up.#Oh, thank you so much. I’m so sorry for the trouble.#It’s fine, no big deal. Let’s clean it up quickly.

331.chinese_text: 午休的时候，我们一起玩猜拳吧？输的人请喝果汁。#好呀，没问题，我肯定能赢你。#哈哈哈，不一定哦，我们试试看。
331.english_text: Let’s play rock-paper-scissors during lunch break! Loser buys juice.#Sure, I’m definitely gonna win.#Hahaha, we’ll see about that.

332.chinese_text: 你知道吗？车站前新开了一家饭团店，听说味道很好。#哦？是吗？我还不知道呢，下次午休我们一起去尝尝吧。#好呀，就这么定了。
332.english_text: You know what? A new onigiri shop opened by the station. I heard it’s really good.#Oh, really? I didn’t know that. Let’s go try it next lunch break.#Deal!

333.chinese_text: 我有点困了，想趴在桌子上睡一会儿，你帮我留意一下时间，别让我睡过头了。#好的，放心吧，到点我叫你，不会让你迟到的。#太感谢了，麻烦你了。
333.english_text: I’m a bit sleepy. I wanna nap on my desk. Can you wake me up on time so I don’t oversleep?#Okay, don’t worry. I’ll call you when it’s time. You won’t be late.#Thank you so much.

334.chinese_text: 下午的社团活动，你要去参加吗？我听说今天有新的练习内容。#嗯，要去的，你也是我们社团的吗？#不是哦，我是来给你们加油的，上次看你们练习很精彩。#太谢谢你了，那欢迎你来活动室参观。
334.english_text: Are you going to the club activity this afternoon? I heard there’s new practice material.#Yeah, I’m going. Are you in our club too?#No, I just came to cheer you on. Your practice last time was amazing.#Thanks! Feel free to come to the activity room and watch.

335.chinese_text: 刚才老师讲的内容，我有点没听懂，你能再给我讲一遍吗？#好呀，其实很简单，我再给你梳理一遍重点，你肯定能听懂。#太感谢了，麻烦你了。
335.english_text: I didn’t really understand what the teacher just said. Could you explain it again?#Sure, it’s actually simple. I’ll go over the key points with you — you’ll get it.#Thank you so much.

336.chinese_text: 课后你要去文具店吗？我想去买本新的笔记本，用来记社团的事情。#好呀，我也想去买支新的画笔，我们一起去吧。#太好了，一起去更有意思。
336.english_text: Are you going to the stationery store after class? I need a new notebook for club stuff.#Yeah, I want to buy a new paintbrush too. Let’s go together.#Great, it’ll be more fun.

337.chinese_text: 你的书包上挂了很多动漫挂件呢，都很可爱。#谢谢夸奖，都是我很喜欢的动漫角色，你也喜欢动漫吗？#嗯，我也很喜欢，尤其是治愈系的。#哈哈，我们果然很合得来。
337.english_text: You have so many anime charms on your bag. They’re really cute.#Thanks! They’re all my favorite characters. Do you like anime too?#Yeah, especially the healing-type ones.#Haha, we really get along.

338.chinese_text: 下午的课有点无聊，我都快睡着了，你还好吗？#我也有点困，不过再坚持一下，下节课就结束了。#嗯，一起坚持一下，放学后去买杯咖啡提神。
338.english_text: This afternoon’s class was kind of boring. I almost fell asleep. How about you?#I’m sleepy too, but let’s hold on — just one more class.#Okay. Let’s get coffee after school to wake up.

339.chinese_text: 你知道吗？下周五要举办学园祭，我们班要开女仆咖啡馆，你要来吗？#真的吗？太好了，我肯定会去的，到时候麻烦你多关照啦。#哈哈，没问题，一定让你满意。
339.english_text: You know what? The school festival is next Friday. Our class is doing a maid café. Wanna come?#Really? Awesome! I’ll definitely be there. Please look after me then.#Haha, no problem. I’ll make sure you have a good time.

340.chinese_text: 我的雨伞忘在教室了，下午好像要下雨，你能借我一把吗？#好呀，我有两把，给你一把，明天记得还我就好。#太感谢了，帮了我大忙，不然我就要被雨淋了。
340.english_text: I left my umbrella in the classroom, and it might rain this afternoon. Can I borrow one?#Sure, I have two. Here you go. Just give it back tomorrow.#Thank you so much! You saved me from getting soaked.

341.chinese_text: 课后我们一起去操场打羽毛球吧？我新买了一副球拍。#好呀，我很久没打羽毛球了，正好陪你玩玩。#太好了，那我们下课就去，别耽误时间。
341.english_text: Let’s play badminton on the field after class. I just bought a new racket.#Okay, I haven’t played in ages. I’d love to join.#Great, we’ll go right after class.

342.chinese_text: 你是学生会的成员吗？我看到你佩戴了学生会的徽章。#对哦，我是学生会的，负责检查社团活动，你有什么事吗？#没有，就是觉得很厉害，想跟你打个招呼。#哈哈，谢谢你的夸奖。
342.english_text: Are you on the student council? I saw you wearing the badge.#Yeah, I’m in charge of checking club activities. Did you need something?#No, I just think it’s cool and wanted to say hi.#Haha, thanks.

343.chinese_text: 我不小心把社团的道具弄坏了，有点着急，你能帮我看看怎么修吗？#好呀，我来看看，应该不难修，我们一起试试。#太感谢了，有你帮忙我就放心了。
343.english_text: I accidentally broke a club prop. I’m kind of worried. Can you help me fix it?#Sure, let me look. It shouldn’t be too hard. Let’s try together.#Thank you so much. I feel better already.

344.chinese_text: 下午的自由活动时间，你要去屋顶看书吗？我想去那里安静地看会儿漫画。#好呀，我也想去屋顶放松一下，我们一起去吧。#太好了，一起去屋顶吹吹风，看看风景。
344.english_text: Do you want to read on the rooftop during free period this afternoon? I wanna read manga quietly.#Yeah, I want to relax up there too. Let’s go together.#Perfect. We can enjoy the wind and the view.

345.chinese_text: 你的手绘很厉害呢，上次看到你画的动漫角色，特别好看。#谢谢夸奖，你要是感兴趣，我可以教你一些简单的画法。#真的吗？太感谢了，我一直想学手绘。
345.english_text: Your drawings are amazing. I saw the anime character you did last time — it was great.#Thanks! If you want, I can teach you some simple drawing skills.#Really? Thank you so much. I’ve always wanted to learn.

346.chinese_text: 课后你要回家吗？还是去社团练习？#我要去社团练习，你呢？#我要回家，不过我们顺路，一起走到车站吧。#好呀，一起走，路上有个伴。
346.english_text: Are you going home after class, or to club practice?#Club practice. You?#I’m going home, but we’re going the same way. Let’s walk to the station together.#Sure, it’s nice having company.

347.chinese_text: 我忘带社团的练习册了，你能借我抄一下重点吗？明天就还你。#好呀，给你，你赶紧抄，别耽误了练习。#太感谢了，麻烦你了。
347.english_text: I forgot my club practice notebook. Can I copy your notes? I’ll give them back tomorrow.#Yeah, here you go. Hurry so you don’t miss practice.#Thank you so much.

348.chinese_text: 下午的阳光有点晒，你怎么不戴帽子？#啊，我忘了带了，还好不是特别晒。#我这里有备用的遮阳帽，你要是觉得晒可以戴上。#太谢谢你了，不用啦，我能坚持。
348.english_text: The sun is pretty strong this afternoon. Why aren’t you wearing a hat?#Oh, I forgot. It’s not too bad though.#I have an extra sunhat if you want it.#Thanks, but I’ll be okay.

349.chinese_text: 放学啦！你要搭乘哪一路电车回家？#我要坐JR线，你呢？#我也是，我们一起去车站吧，路上聊聊天。#好呀，一起走。
349.english_text: School’s out! Which train are you taking home?#I’m taking the JR line. You?#Same here! Let’s walk to the station together and chat.#Sure, let’s go.

350.chinese_text: 车站前的便利店，今天有限定的草莓牛奶，我们一起去买吧。#好呀，我早就想喝了，我们赶紧去，不然就卖完了。#没问题，一起去。
350.english_text: The convenience store in front of the station has limited-edition strawberry milk today. Let’s go get some.#Yes! I’ve been wanting to try it. Hurry before they sell out.#Okay, let’s go.

351.chinese_text: 傍晚的夕阳好漂亮，你看到了吗？在操场那边，特别美。#看到了，真的好好看，我刚才还拍了照片。#哇，能给我看看吗？#当然可以，你看，拍得还不错吧。
351.english_text: The sunset is so beautiful this evening! Did you see it over the playground?#Yeah, it’s amazing. I took a photo just now.#Wow, can I see?#Sure, look. Not bad, right?

352.chinese_text: 你今天要去打工吗？我看到你背着打工的包。#对哦，我要去车站前的便利店打工，你呢？#我要回家，不过我们顺路，我送你到便利店门口吧。#太谢谢你了，麻烦你了。
352.english_text: Are you going to work part-time today? I saw your work bag.#Yeah, I’m working at the convenience store by the station. You?#I’m going home, but we’re on the way. I’ll walk you there.#Thanks a lot, I appreciate it.

353.chinese_text: 学校附近的樱花树，傍晚的时候特别好看，我们去拍张照吧。#好呀，正好我也想拍，我们一起去，互相帮忙拍。#太好了，赶紧去，夕阳还没下山。
353.english_text: The cherry blossom trees near school look extra pretty at dusk. Let’s take a picture.#Sure, I wanted to too. Let’s go and take photos for each other.#Great, hurry before the sun sets.

354.chinese_text: 我妈妈让我去超市买东西，你要一起去吗？超市就在车站旁边。#好呀，我也想去买些零食，我们一起去，互相帮忙拎东西。#太好了，一起去更方便。
354.english_text: My mom wants me to go shopping at the supermarket. Wanna come? It’s right by the station.#Okay, I need to buy some snacks too. Let’s go together and help each other carry things.#Perfect, it’ll be easier.

355.chinese_text: 傍晚的风好舒服，我们慢慢走，别着急去车站，聊聊天吧。#好呀，我也不想太早回家，我们慢慢走，说说今天在学校的事情。#嗯，这样也很惬意。
355.english_text: The evening breeze is so nice. Let’s walk slowly to the station and chat.#Sure, I don’t want to go home early either. Let’s talk about school today.#Yeah, this is really relaxing.

356.chinese_text: 你知道吗？车站前的甜品店，今天有限定的芒果班戟，很好吃。#哦？是吗？我还不知道呢，我们一起去尝尝吧。#好呀，就这么定了，一起去。
356.english_text: You know what? The dessert shop by the station has limited mango pancakes today. They’re delicious.#Oh, really? I didn’t know. Let’s go try them.#Okay, it’s a deal.

357.chinese_text: 我不小心把电车卡弄丢了，有点着急，你能陪我去车站的服务台问问吗？#当然可以，别着急，我们一起去问问，应该能找到。#太感谢了，有你在我就放心了。
357.english_text: I lost my train card. I’m really worried. Can you come with me to the station information desk?#Of course. Don’t panic, let’s go ask. We might find it.#Thank you so much. I feel better with you here.

358.chinese_text: 你今天的社团练习累不累？看你好像有点疲惫。#还好，就是练习了很久，有点累。#那你赶紧回家休息，别太累了，明天还有课呢。#谢谢你的关心，我会的。
358.english_text: Was club practice tiring today? You look a bit worn out.#It was okay, just a long session. I’m a bit tired.#Then go home and rest soon. Don’t push yourself — we have class tomorrow.#Thanks for caring. I will.

359.chinese_text: 我们一起去公园散散步吧？傍晚的公园很安静，很适合放松。#好呀，我也想去散散步，放松一下，我们一起去。#太好了，一起走。
359.english_text: Let’s take a walk in the park? It’s quiet and perfect for relaxing at dusk.#Sure, I need to unwind too. Let’s go.#Great, let’s go.

360.chinese_text: 你买的这个动漫周边，是最近新出的吗？看起来很特别。#对哦，是昨天刚出的，你也喜欢这个角色吗？#嗯，我很喜欢，在哪里买的呀？#在车站前的动漫店，还有很多款式呢。
360.english_text: Is that new anime merchandise you bought? It looks special.#Yeah, it just came out yesterday. Do you like this character too?#Yeah, I love him! Where did you get it?#At the anime shop in front of the station. They have lots of designs.

361.chinese_text: 傍晚的街道很热闹，好多小摊，我们去看看好不好？#好呀，我最喜欢逛小摊了，我们一起去，尝尝那边的章鱼小丸子。#太好了，一起去。
361.english_text: The street is really lively this evening, with lots of stalls. Let’s check them out.#Sure, I love browsing stalls! Let’s go try the takoyaki over there.#Awesome, let’s go.

362.chinese_text: 我要去住宅区的便利店买东西，你顺路吗？一起走。#好呀，我正好也要回家，顺路，我们一起走。#太好了，路上有个伴。
362.english_text: I’m going to the convenience store in the neighborhood. Are we going the same way? Let’s walk together.#Yeah, I’m heading home too. We’re on the same route.#Great, having company is nice.

363.chinese_text: 放学回家别玩太晚，记得早点休息，明天还要上学呢。#知道啦，你也是，别熬夜看漫画，早点休息。#放心吧，我会的，明天见。#明天见。
363.english_text: Don’t stay out too late after school. Remember to rest early — we have school tomorrow.#Got it. You too, don’t stay up reading manga. Sleep early.#I will. See you tomorrow.#See you.

364.chinese_text: 晚上好！你也来公园散步吗？我饭后出来走走。#晚上好！是啊，我也来散步，吹吹晚风，很舒服。#嗯，傍晚的风确实很舒服，我们一起走一会儿吧。#好呀。
364.english_text: Good evening! Are you here for a walk in the park too? I came out after dinner.#Good evening! Yeah, I’m here to walk and enjoy the evening breeze. It’s so nice.#Yeah, the wind is really pleasant. Let’s walk together for a while.#Sure.

365.chinese_text: 我在看新出的动漫，超好看的，你看过吗？#还没有呢，是什么类型的？#是校园治愈系的，很温暖，我推荐你看看。#好呀，等我写完作业就去看，谢谢你推荐。
365.english_text: I’m watching the new anime, it’s so good. Have you seen it?#Not yet. What genre is it?#It’s a heartwarming school slice-of-life. Really cozy. I recommend it.#Okay, I’ll watch it after homework. Thanks for the suggestion.

366.chinese_text: 晚上的星星好亮，你看到了吗？今天的天气真好。#看到了，真的很亮，好久没看到这么多星星了。#嗯，我们一起看看星星，聊聊天吧。#好呀，很惬意。
366.english_text: The stars are so bright tonight! The weather is perfect.#I know, they’re really shining. Haven’t seen this many stars in ages.#Yeah, let’s stargaze and chat.#Sounds nice and relaxing.

367.chinese_text: 我有点饿了，想煮点拉面，你要不要来我家一起吃？我煮的拉面很好吃。#太谢谢你了，不过我已经吃过晚饭了，下次吧。#好呀，下次有机会再一起吃。
367.english_text: I’m a bit hungry, gonna make some ramen. Wanna come over and eat with me? Mine’s really good.#Thanks so much, but I already had dinner. Maybe next time.#Alright, we can eat together another time.

368.chinese_text: 我在便利店买了些零食，分你一些，是你喜欢的口味。#太谢谢你了，你还记得我喜欢的口味，太贴心了。#不客气，我们关系这么好，肯定记得。
368.english_text: I bought some snacks at the convenience store. Have some — it’s your favorite flavor.#Thank you! You remembered what I like. That’s so sweet.#No problem. We’re close, of course I remember.

369.chinese_text: 晚上你要复习吗？我打算复习一下今天在学校学的内容。#嗯，我也要复习，我们可以互相抽查，一起进步。#好呀，那我们视频连线，一起复习。#好主意，马上就来。
369.english_text: Are you gonna study tonight? I plan to review what we learned today.#Yeah, me too. We can quiz each other and improve together.#Great! Let’s video call and study together.#Good idea, coming right up.

370.chinese_text: 我家的猫有点调皮，一直闹，你能陪我聊聊天，分散一下注意力吗？#当然可以，你家的猫很可爱吧？给我看看照片呗。#好呀，我给你发照片，它真的很调皮。
370.english_text: My cat is being so naughty and hyper. Can you chat with me to distract me?#Of course! Your cat must be cute. Show me a photo.#Okay, I’ll send it. She’s really mischievous.

371.chinese_text: 晚上的便利店，有新出的冰淇淋，你要不要去买？我陪你一起去。#好呀，我正好想吃冰淇淋，我们一起去。#太好了，一起去，顺便聊聊天。
371.english_text: They have new ice cream at the convenience store tonight. Wanna go get some? I’ll go with you.#Sure, I was craving ice cream anyway. Let’s go.#Perfect, we can talk while we’re at it.

372.chinese_text: 我在听动漫主题曲，超好听的，分享给你，你听听看。#好呀，我马上听，哇，真的很好听，给我发个链接吧。#好嘞，马上发你，我们一起听。
372.english_text: I’m listening to an anime theme song, it’s amazing. I’ll share it with you.#Okay, I’ll listen right now… Wow, it’s really good. Send me the link.#Sure, sending it now. Let’s listen together.

373.chinese_text: 明天要带的东西，你都准备好吗？我差点忘了带社团的练习册。#我都准备好啦，你要是忘了，明天可以借我的用一下。#太谢谢你了，我现在就去准备。
373.english_text: Did you pack everything for tomorrow? I almost forgot my club practice notebook.#I’m all set. If you forget, you can borrow mine tomorrow.#Thank you so much. I’ll go pack it right now.

374.chinese_text: 晚上别玩太久手机，对眼睛不好，早点休息。#知道啦，你也是，别熬夜复习，注意身体。#放心吧，我会的，晚安。#晚安。
374.english_text: Don’t use your phone too late at night, it’s bad for your eyes. Go to bed early.#Got it. You too, don’t stay up studying. Take care of yourself.#I will. Good night.#Good night.

375.chinese_text: 我新拼好了一个动漫模型，超好看的，你要不要来我家看看？#好呀，我早就想看了，马上就来，麻烦你等我一下。#不麻烦，我等你，快来吧。
375.english_text: I just finished building a new anime model, it looks awesome. Wanna come over and see?#Sure, I’ve been wanting to see it. I’ll be right there, just wait a sec.#No trouble at all. I’ll be waiting, hurry over.

376.chinese_text: 我有点害怕打雷，你能陪我聊聊天吗？直到雷声停。#当然可以，别害怕，我一直陪着你，给你讲笑话，让你不害怕。#太谢谢你了，有你在我就不害怕了。
376.english_text: I’m scared of thunder. Can you stay and chat with me until it stops?#Of course. Don’t be afraid, I’m here with you. I’ll tell you jokes to distract you.#Thank you so much. I feel safe with you.

377.chinese_text: 我妈妈做了铜锣烧，给你留了一份，我送过去给你吧。#太谢谢你了，你和你妈妈都太好了，麻烦你了。#不麻烦，顺路而已，马上就到。
377.english_text: My mom made dorayaki, and I saved you some. I’ll bring them over.#Thank you both so much. Sorry to trouble you.#It’s no bother, I’m on my way.

378.chinese_text: 晚上我们一起玩线上游戏吧？我新下载了一个，超好玩的。#好呀，我正无聊呢，一起玩，我们组队肯定能赢。#太好了，马上上线，等你。
378.english_text: Let’s play online games tonight! I just downloaded a really fun one.#Sure, I’m bored anyway. Let’s team up — we’ll definitely win.#Awesome, logging on now. Waiting for you.

379.chinese_text: 我在整理社团的照片，看到上次学园祭的照片，很怀念。#是吗？我也想看看，你发给我吧，一起回忆一下。#好呀，马上发给你，是不是很怀念？#嗯，真的很怀念。
379.english_text: I’m sorting club photos and found ones from the school festival. Makes me nostalgic.#Really? I wanna see too. Send them to me so we can reminisce.#Okay, sending now. Don’t you miss it?#Yeah, I really do.

380.chinese_text: 晚上的住宅区很安静，很适合看书，你在看什么书？#我在看轻小说，很治愈，你要是感兴趣，下次借给你。#好呀，太谢谢你了，我正好想找本轻小说看。
380.english_text: The neighborhood is so quiet at night, perfect for reading. What are you reading?#A light novel. It’s really heartwarming. I can lend it to you if you want.#Yes please! I’ve been looking for a good one.

381.chinese_text: 我不小心把水杯打碎了，有点着急，你能陪我聊聊天吗？#别着急，碎碎平安，下次再买一个就好，我陪你聊聊天，别难过。#太谢谢你了，有你真好。
381.english_text: I accidentally broke my water cup. I’m a bit upset. Can you chat with me?#Don’t worry, broken things mean good luck is coming. Just buy a new one. I’ll stay and cheer you up.#Thank you so much. You’re the best.

382.chinese_text: 明天我们一起去车站前的动漫店吧？听说有新的周边发售。#好呀，我早就想去了，我们明天早点去，不然就卖完了。#太好了，一言为定，明天见。#明天见。
382.english_text: Let’s go to the anime shop in front of the station tomorrow. They’re releasing new merchandise.#Yes! I’ve been wanting to go. Let’s get there early before they sell out.#Perfect, it’s a deal. See you tomorrow.#See you.

383.chinese_text: 今天真的很开心，和你一起上学、一起吃饭、一起放学，谢谢你。#我也很开心，能和你做朋友，真的很好，以后我们也要经常一起。#嗯，一定，我们要一直保持这样的关系。#好呀。
383.english_text: I had such a great day today — going to school, eating, and leaving with you. Thank you.#I had a great time too. I’m really glad we’re friends. Let’s hang out often.#Yeah, definitely. Let’s stay like this always.#Sure.
